_note: This file drives the merit calculator AND the policy history tab. Modify 'components' to add/remove calculator fields. Set 'included': false to hide a component without deleting it. Each year key represents the dominant induction of that calendar year. total_marks must equal the sum of all included max_marks.

_induction_max._note: Per-induction total marks. Used when two inductions share a calendar year (e.g. 2026 has Ind 20 = 35 marks, Ind 21 = 30 marks). flat_lookup rows should carry 'induction' field. Falls back to year_total_max if absent.

_year_total_max_note: 2026 = Induction 20 (Dec 2025/Jan 2026, 35 marks). Induction 21 (Jun 2026, 30 marks) uses active_policy '2026' for calculator only.

2020.label: 2020 (Induction 8 -- Jul 2020)
2020.policy_ref: Pre-March 2021 policy (document unavailable -- inferred from continuity with Ind 9--14)

components.label: Matric / SSC
components.description: Enter Matric marks as percentage (obtained / total x 100). Scaled to 5 marks.

components.label: Intermediate / HSSC
components.description: Enter Intermediate marks as percentage. Scaled to 7 marks.

components.label: MBBS / BDS Aggregate
components.description: Your MBBS/BDS aggregate % (sum of all professional marks / total x 100). Scaled to 20 marks.

components.label: FCPS Part-I / MD / MS / MDS Part-I
components.description: PART-I score as percentage. FCPS-I pass without score = 100%. Scaled to 40 marks.

components.label: House Job

tiers.label: Punjab grad -- elsewhere in Pakistan (2.5 pts)
Foreign grad -- Punjab Teaching Hospital (2.5 pts)

components.description: Select your house job status.

components.label: Parent Institute
components.description: Tick if applying to the same institution you graduated from (SHC&ME-controlled only).

components.label: Service Experience
components.description: Post-house-job service at primary/secondary/tertiary healthcare facilities. ~2 marks/year approximate. Max 10 marks.

components.label: University-Level Positions
components.description: 1st/2nd/3rd position in University-level professional exams. MBBS: 0.6 pts/pos. BDS: 0.75 pts/pos. Max 3 pts.

components.label: 1st-Attempt MBBS Professionals
components.description: Not included in this year.

components.label: Hard Area Service
components.description: Not included in this year.

components.label: MDCAT Score
components.description: Not applicable for this year.

components.label: FCPS Part-I / JCAT (pass/fail)
components.description: Not applicable for this year.

2020.notes: Pre-March 2021 policy. Formula inferred -- PART-I dominates at 40 marks. Total: 95 marks.
tidbits: PART-I is the dominant component at 40 marks -- FCPS/MD/MS performance is critical.
Matric + Intermediate contribute 12 marks -- early academic record counts.
Total out of 95 -- a closing merit of 85.68 corresponds to ~90.2% of the maximum.

2021.notes: Original March 2021 PPM. PART-I (40 marks) + Matric/Inter/MBBS aggregate + house job + parent institute + experience + university positions. Total: 95 marks.
tidbits: PART-I exam result is the largest single component at 40 marks -- FCPS-I pass awarded full 40 marks.
Matric (5) + Intermediate (7) = 12 marks -- early academic record matters.
MBBS aggregate (20 marks) rewards consistent professional exam performance.
University positions: 0.6 pts/position (MBBS), 0.75 pts/position (BDS) at university level only.
Total out of 95, not 100. Observed max: 80.68 (Jan 2021), 80.68 (Jul 2021).

2022.notes: Same March 2021 PPM formula. Total: 95 marks. Observed max: 77.93 (Jan 2022), 80.61 (Jul 2022).
tidbits: Formula identical to 2021 -- consistent year-on-year for inductions 9--14.
PART-I (40 marks) + Matric + Inter + MBBS aggregate dominates the formula.
Jan 2022 observed max: 77.93. Jul 2022 observed max: 80.61.

2023.notes: Same formula as 2021--2022. Highest observed max in PART-I era: 87.94 (Jan 2023). Total: 95 marks.
tidbits: Highest observed max merit in PART-I era: 87.94 in Jan 2023 -- most competitive PART-I cohort.
Formula unchanged from previous two years -- strong cross-year comparability.
Jul 2023 observed max: 84.98 -- slight decrease from Jan 2023.

2024.label: 2024 (Inductions 15--16)
2024.policy_ref: New PPM: SO(ME-I)7-1/2024(CIP) dated 15 May 2024 -- superseded all prior policies. Jan 2024 amendment (Ind 15) briefly added 'Attempts in MBBS' (total 100 marks) before being superseded.

2024.notes: May 2024 PPM superseded all prior policies but maintained the same formula at 95 marks. Jan 2024 amendment (attempts_in_mbbs) was short-lived.
tidbits: New PPM issued May 2024 officially repealed March 2021 policy, but scoring formula is unchanged.
Jan 2024 amendment briefly added 'Attempts in MBBS' (5 marks, total 100) -- then removed in May 2024 PPM.
To model Jan 2024 (Ind 15): enable 'attempts_in_mbbs' and set total_marks to 100.
Observed max 2024: 85.92 out of 95 -- consistent with prior PART-I era years.

components.label: Hard Area Service (BHUs/RHCs)
components.description: Service at notified Hard Area BHUs/RHCs (SHCMED ref: SO(ME-I)7-17/2024(CIS) dated 29-10-2024). 1.25 pts per 3 consecutive months. Maximum 1 year = 5 pts. Enter months of hard area service (max 12).

components.description: Not applicable.

2025.notes: MAJOR change: PART-I (40 marks) REMOVED. Hard Area Service (5 marks) added. Total drops from 95 -> 60 marks. Raw scores NOT comparable to prior years -- use Centile view.
tidbits: Biggest formula change in PRP history: PART-I exam removed entirely (was 40/95 marks = 42% of total).
New component: Hard Area Service -- 1.25 pts per 3 months at notified BHUs/RHCs, max 5 pts (1 year).
Total maximum is now 60 marks -- raw scores directly incomparable to 2021--2024 data.
Use Centile view (% of max) for cross-year comparison: observed max ~46.6 = 77.7% of 60.
Hard Area and Experience both to be reduced/discontinued from Jan 2026 (Ind 20).

2026-1.label: 2026 (Induction 20 -- Dec 2025/Jan 2026)
2026-1.policy_ref: Notification dated 26 November 2025. Completely new formula. Matric/Inter/PART-I/Parent Institute removed. MDCAT and FCPS/JCAT introduced.

components.label: MDCAT Score
components.description: Your MDCAT score out of 1100. Scaled to 2 marks.

components.label: MBBS / BDS Degree Aggregate
components.description: Your MBBS/BDS aggregate % (sum of professional marks / total x 100). Scaled to 15 marks.

components.label: Service Experience
components.description: Post-house-job service at government health facilities. ~1.25 marks/year approximate. Max 5 marks. Detailed tier structure pending publication.

components.label: University-Level Positions
components.description: 1st/2nd/3rd position in University-level professional exams. MBBS: 0.6 pts/pos. BDS: 0.75 pts/pos. Max 3 pts.

components.label: FCPS Part-I / JCAT (pass/fail)
components.description: Tick if you have passed FCPS Part-I OR hold a JCAT qualification. 5 marks (pass/fail -- not score-scaled).

components.label: Matric / SSC
components.description: REMOVED from formula from November 2025 onwards.

components.label: Intermediate / HSSC
components.description: REMOVED from formula from November 2025 onwards.

components.label: FCPS Part-I score-based (40 marks era)
components.description: Replaced by FCPS/JCAT boolean (5 pts) from November 2025.

components.label: Parent Institute
components.description: REMOVED from formula from November 2025 onwards.

components.label: Hard Area Service
components.description: DISCONTINUED from January 2026 induction onwards.

components.label: 1st-Attempt MBBS Professionals
components.description: Not included in this formula.

2026-1.notes: Completely new formula from November 2025. Matric/Inter/PART-I/Parent Institute all removed. MDCAT (2 pts) and FCPS/JCAT pass (5 pts) introduced. Total: 35 marks.
tidbits: Complete overhaul: total drops from 60 to 35 marks. Formula components restructured.
MDCAT introduced (2 marks) -- benefits recent graduates who scored well on MDCAT.
FCPS/JCAT: now 5 marks pass/fail (was 40 marks score-based in 2020--2024) -- massive reduction.
Matric + Intermediate removed -- 12 marks that no longer matter for merit.
Parent institute bonus removed -- where you graduated no longer gives marks.
Hard Area service discontinued -- rural service no longer rewarded.
Observed max 2026: 29.07 out of 35 = 83.1% of maximum achievable.

2026.notes: Slightly changed from Induction 20 (Dec/Jan 2026) . Matric/Inter/PART-I/Parent Institute all removed. Experience Marks discontinued. Total: 30 marks.
tidbits: Complete overhaul: total drops from 60 to 30 marks. Formula components restructured.
MDCAT introduced (2 marks) -- benefits recent graduates who scored well on MDCAT.
FCPS/JCAT: now 5 marks pass/fail (was 40 marks score-based in 2020--2024) -- massive reduction.
Matric + Intermediate removed -- 12 marks that no longer matter for merit.
Parent institute bonus removed -- where you graduated no longer gives marks.
Hard Area service  and Experience marks discontinued -- rural service no longer rewarded.
